summary.text: [0-8] A white plate displays dried dark purple flowers, a thin orange root, a large yellow wedge, and a small pile of green dried leaves. Additional brown roots appear on the right edge, with a colorful package and woven mat in the background. The camera remains static on these ingredients. [8-10] A hand enters from the left edge, fingers touching the pile of dried dark purple flowers. The camera moves closer to the ingredients, cropping out more of the background package and woven mat. [10-12] The camera zooms in closer on the white plate, cropping out the colorful background package. The view pans slightly right, bringing the bundle of brown roots on the far edge into clearer focus. The hand withdraws from the frame.

[12-14] The camera tilts upward and left, causing the yellow wedge and orange root to exit the frame, centering on dried dark purple flowers and green leaves on a white plate. [14-16] A hand enters from the upper left to grasp a purple flower as the camera tilts down, returning the yellow wedge and orange root to view. [16-18] The camera zooms in and pans right, emphasizing the bundle of brown roots on the right edge and the yellow wedge near the green leaves. [18-20] The view tilts up to reveal colorful wrapped gifts with festive patterns in the background before tilting back down to the plate. [20-26] The camera maintains a steady high-angle shot of the static ingredients—purple flowers, orange root, yellow wedge, and green leaves—with a blue gift box featuring a yellow giraffe illustration visible in the upper left corner against a woven mat.

[26-40] A static high-angle shot displays a white plate holding a pile of dried purple flowers, a single orange root, a yellow wedge, and loose green tea leaves. A colorful gift box sits on the woven mat in the upper left corner, while a bundle of brown roots remains visible on the right edge. The camera maintains a fixed position throughout the sequence, capturing the motionless arrangement of ingredients without any changes in lighting or user interaction. The scene remains consistent, with no new objects entering the frame and the existing items staying in their original positions.

[40-44] A static high-angle shot captures a white plate arranged with dried dark purple hibiscus flowers, an orange turmeric root on the left, and green tea leaves on the right. A yellow lemon wedge is partially visible at the bottom edge. In the background, a colorful gift box sits on a woven mat in the upper left, while brown roots appear on the right.
[44-52] The camera shifts downward to fully reveal a large yellow lemon wedge at the bottom center of the plate. The ingredient arrangement remains motionless, with the purple flowers occupying the upper section, the turmeric root on the left, and the tea leaves on the right. The background elements, including the gift box and woven mat, remain unchanged.

[52-62] A static high-angle shot captures a white plate arranged with dried dark purple flowers, a brown root on the left, green tea leaves on the right, and a large yellow lemon wedge at the bottom center. The camera slowly zooms in on the yellow lemon wedge and orange turmeric root, cropping the background gift box and woven mat, while lighting remains consistent. [62-66] The scene abruptly transitions to a solid, uniform bright red screen filling the entire frame, eliminating all previous visual elements.

A hand holds a bundle of fresh roots featuring brown and yellow skin tied together with red string in the foreground from [66-80]. On the left, the edge of a white plate containing dried purple flowers and green tea leaves remains partially visible. The background reveals a blurred glass table surface beneath the ingredients. From [68-74], the camera tilts slightly, revealing a patterned woven mat in the upper left corner above the table. The scene remains largely static with the roots held steadily in the foreground, maintaining focus on the bundle and the plate's edge throughout the duration.

[80-84] A hand holds a bundle of fresh brown and yellow roots tied with red string before the camera pans left to re-center a white plate. [84-94] The plate displays dried purple flowers, green tea leaves, a yellow lemon wedge, and a single orange root. The bundle of fresh roots remains partially visible on the right edge over a glass table surface. A woven mat and gift box appear in the background. The scene stays static with consistent lighting and no further interaction.

[94-108] A static, high-angle shot captures a white plate arranged with natural ingredients on a glass surface. The plate features a large pile of dried, dark purple flower calyces, a single slender orange root on the left, a pale yellow wedge at the bottom, and a small mound of dried green tea leaves on the right. Adjacent to the plate on the right edge, a cluster of fresh, brownish-orange roots tied with a red band is partially visible. The background shows a woven placemat and a colorful package. Throughout the sequence, the camera remains completely stationary, and there is no interaction with the items; the lighting and composition remain unchanged.

From 108s to 120s, a static high-angle shot displays a white plate arranged with dried purple flowers, a slender orange root, a yellow lemon wedge, and green tea leaves.
